title: Refactor SRP-002 (SRP): The class combines non-blocking input management, complex non-blocking JSON t...

detected_issue.description: The class combines non-blocking input management, complex non-blocking JSON token traversal state machine, various non-blocking JSON value parsing, non-blocking JSON name parsing and canonicalization, non-blocking character encoding/decoding, non-blocking whitespace/comment skipping, and error reporting.
detected_issue.reasoning: Similar to `UTF8StreamJsonParser`, this class is a 'God class' but with the added complexity of non-blocking I/O and state management. The `_finishToken()` method acts as a dispatcher to numerous other `_finishXxx()` methods, each handling a specific token type's continuation. This structure highlights the bundling of many distinct responsibilities (e.g., `_finishBOM`, `_finishKeywordToken`, `_finishNumberIntegralPart`, `_parseEscapedName`, `_decodeSplitUTF8_3`) within a single class, making it extremely complex and difficult to maintain. Any change to the non-blocking I/O model, JSON parsing rules, or character decoding logic would necessitate extensive modifications.

fix_logic.summary: Extracts comment and whitespace skipping logic into NonBlockingCommentSkipper.
fix_logic.rationale: The `NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase` class was responsible for too many concerns, including parsing JSON tokens, managing input, and handling comments/whitespace. This refactoring extracts the cohesive responsibility of non-blocking comment and whitespace skipping into a new package-private class, `NonBlockingCommentSkipper`. This reduces the complexity of `NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase`, making it easier to maintain and understand, and aligns with the Single Responsibility Principle. To enable this extraction, several private parsing methods in `NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase` were promoted to protected visibility, allowing the new helper class to delegate back to them for state transitions.
